scenarios.title: Boundary Cleanup on GunPoint
scenarios.objective: Produce a clean three-part segmentation and resolve one ambiguous boundary.
successChecklist: At least one manual boundary edit is attempted.
No unrecoverable FAIL state remains at the end of the task.

scenarios.title: Suggestion Review and Override
scenarios.objective: Load one model suggestion, accept or override it, and finish with a justified final segmentation.
successChecklist: The exported session contains either suggestion_accepted or suggestion_overridden.
At least one follow-up semantic edit is recorded after review.

scenarios.title: Constraint-Limited Merge Decision
scenarios.objective: Attempt a merge near a constrained boundary and decide whether to keep or revise the segmentation.
successChecklist: One constraint warning or failure is encountered.
The participant finishes with an exported session log.
Target segment IDs remain visible in the exported metadata.
